title: Best Practices for Integration Testing Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on integration testing best practices.

questions.question: Regarding integration testing, why is it beneficial to use a 'representative' environment?
options: To ensure that your integration tests are as accurate and predictive of production as possible

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a integration-testing-best-practices workflow?
options: Prioritizing the testing of 'seams' or interactions between different software components, such as between your API and database
Recording a commit directly to the SQL database
Its only possible for SQL repositories

questions.question: Regarding the integration testing, why is it beneficial to automate your environment's setup and cleanup?
options: It ensures a clean and predictable state for every test run
It makes your local machine faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
